jobs.title: Applied AI Engineer
jobs.description: DevRev is hiring for the role of Applied AI Engineer! Responsibilities of the Candidate: Design, develop and implement integrations, automations and customizations to integrate DevRev with customers’ tech stack and workflows, and ensure successful customer engagements. Utilize AI in novel ways to solve customer problems, including Generative AI techniques like prompt engineering for foundation large language models (LLMs) to enable great AI agent experience. Work on semantic search engine fine-tuning for better search accuracy. Conduct data analysis, writing SQL queries, and building dashboards to share insights and drive decision-making. Be proactive in communicating and keeping constant feedback loops to all key stakeholders including Customers, Engineering, Product, Customer Success ... jobs.title: Senior AI Product Engineer
jobs.description: Role Overview : As a Senior AI Product Engineer, you will work across product, engineering, customer workflows, and AI-native systems to rapidly build and scale enterprise applications. You will own problems end-to-end : - Understanding customer pain points - Designing workflows - Building prototypes - Shipping production systems - Iterating based on real-world feedback This is a high-ownership engineering role with strong product involvement. We are looking for engineers who naturally think like builders. What You'll Do : - Design and build end-to-end product experiences and systems - Work directly with customers and internal teams to understand operational workflows - Rapidly prototype and iterate using modern AI development tools - Build production-grade applications and internal platforms - Contribute across frontend, backend, workflows, APIs, automation, and AI-assisted systems - Use AI tools aggressively to accelerate development, experimentation, and iteration - Drive product direction through technical and product intuition - Identify opportunities for automation and simplification across workflows - Help shape the future architecture of AI-native enterprise applications What We're Looking For : We are specifically looking for engineers who : - Have 6+ years of engineering experience Have built products or systems end-to-end - Have worked on projects with real users, customers, or monetization - Build side projects, experiments, tools, or products outside of work - Actively use AI tools in their daily workflow - Have strong product intuition alongside technical depth - Enjoy high ownership and fast execution - Are comfortable working across multiple parts of the stack - Prefer building and shipping over process-heavy environments Strong Signals - We value engineers who have : - Built and launched independent products or startups - Monetized side projects or tools - Created internal tools that improved workflows significantly - Used AI tools to dramatically increase development velocity - Strong curiosity around AI-native software development - Demonstrated ability to move from idea prototype production quickly Technologies Workflows You may work with : - AI-assisted development tools - Large language model workflows - Full-stack product systems - Enterprise SaaS applications - Video AI and operational intelligence platforms - APIs, automation systems, and distributed infrastructure Experience with tools such as : - ChatGPT Claude Cursor Replit Lovable v0 GitHub Copilot - AI coding agents is highly valued. Successful engineers in this role : - Ship quickly and iterate continuously - Think deeply about customer workflows and usability - Build systems with strong product intuition - Use AI to meaningfully improve execution speed - Operate independently with high ownership - Contribute beyond pure implementation into product direction and strategy
